title: Add idempotency-key support to a write
description: Define and document idempotency-key semantics for an unsafe operation so retries return the original result instead of duplicating effects.
body: Use when a create or other non-idempotent operation needs safe retries in its contract. Do not leave the retry behavior implicit. Actions: specify the idempotency-key header on the operation; define that a repeated key returns the original response within a retention window; document conflicts when a key is reused with a different body. Validation signals include a retried request returning the first result with no duplicate created. Risk boundary: for money movement defer to the finance domain and require its gate; here, define the contract so clients can retry without duplicates.
